title: ...One Third of a Nation...
writer: Oliver H.P. Garrett, Arthur Arent, Dudley Murphy
actors: Sylvia Sidney, Leif Erickson, Myron McCormick
plot: A fire in a run-down tenement building injures young Joey Rogers. Wealthy passerby Peter Cortlant rushes the boy and his attractive older sister Mary to the hospital and pays the medical expenses for the poverty-stricken family. O...
